真正的种田文，我很有信心。
非套路文，原创世界观，架空世界。
整体风格概括为：灵气复苏版的星露谷物语＋乡村发展致富经。
林清野穿越了，职业是：农场主。
他的日常是这样的：
【通告：招聘酿酒师，要求物种不限（猴子优先），包吃住，有二阶灵果练手！】
【通告：招聘水电工程师，要求自带大板牙，擅长筑坝（河狸优先），待遇面议！】
【通告：出售高阶灵植，副作用是可能会让全村晚上睡不着觉，慎买！】
看着满院子努力“内卷”不想被端上餐桌的奇葩动植物，林清野无奈摊手：
“别问我为什么这么强，我真的只是个平平无奇的种地人。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e50b5b5967a9c5ebe8304760d37afc11","author":"爱吃肉的吗丁啉","author_id":"","book_id":"7540725756360395838","book_name":"任职边陲，我靠种田惊呆全村","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#7898b0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7540725976150327870","read_count":"13837","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"983916"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"456","tags":"都市种田,都市,穿越,美食,基建,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/825aa192dc56dc015e6eaf31dd3ed1ad~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779470103&x-signature=i4KdOmkOk3H7XowHL13QkdLAUFc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104499815329","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324011503D6FE452C4A7B692A66B3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,
